title: Income-related benefits: estimates of take-up: financial year ending 2024
body: "This report looks at estimates of take-up for income-related benefits.  There can be no new claims for any of the working-age benefits. This publication will therefore only focus on take-up for pensioners.  The pension age benefits covered are:   Pension Credit (PC) Housing Benefit (HB) (for Pensioners)   Our Statistical practice is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR).  "
